message:
feat(checkpoint): add error checkpoint support for failure recovery

- Add createErrorCheckpoint() for capturing state before error propagation
- Add withErrorCheckpoint() wrapper for async operations with automatic capture
- Error checkpoints are always compressed and tagged for easy identification
- Error checkpoints never throw - failures are logged but don't cascade
- Add tests for error checkpoint functionality

This completes more of the acceptance criteria for checkpoint/restore:
- Error checkpoints: auto-capture before error propagation ✓
- Includes error context in checkpoint metadata ✓
- Does not fail if checkpoint creation fails ✓

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
